arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Sporting Lisbon: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: RB Leipzig play host to Sporting Lisbon looking to get their first points of the UEFA Champions League's league phase on Wednesday (kick-off: 6.45pm CET). João Pereira lasted only eight games in the job, but his replacment, Rui Borges, has performed well since his arrival, winning three of his five matches to maintain Sporting's position at the summit of Portuguese football.
